browse.title: Events
browse.subtitle: Discover workshops, shows, and community gatherings across Zambia.
browse.emptyBody: Try another date filter or check back soon for new listings.
browse.hostPitch: Sell tickets with dynamic QR check-in and get paid securely.

detail.metaDescription: {title} at {venue}. View dates, tickets, and venue details on Vergeo5.

ticketPurchase.groupUpsell: Add {count, plural, one {# more} other {# more}} to pay {price} each

errors.generic: Could not complete request. Try again.
errors.freeUseRsvp: This is a free event — use Reserve.
errors.attendeeNamesRequired: Enter a name for each ticket.
errors.attendeeNamesMismatch: Enter exactly one name per ticket.

wallet.title: My tickets
wallet.emptyBody: Tickets you buy or RSVP to will appear here with a rotating QR code for entry.

detail.qrLabel: Show this QR at the gate
detail.pinUnavailable: PIN was sent when you bought this ticket. Check your messages if you need it.
detail.offlineBody: Using cached entry codes. Sync when back online for fresh codes.
detail.offlineExpired: Cached codes expired — use your PIN at the gate.

status.transferred: This ticket was transferred and can no longer be used.
status.void: This ticket is no longer valid.

detail.transferBanner: Transferred tickets cannot be scanned. The recipient has a new QR and PIN.
detail.voidBanner: This ticket has been voided and cannot be used for entry.

transfer.title: Transfer ticket
transfer.subtitle: Send this ticket to a friend for free. They'll sign in with the phone number below to claim it.
transfer.cutoffNotice: Transfers close 6 hours before the event starts.
transfer.successBody: We've notified {phone}. They can claim this ticket by signing in with that number.

claimBanner.title: A friend sent you a ticket
claimBanner.body: {event} starts {datetime}. Claim it before it expires.
claimBanner.claimedNotice: Ticket claimed — find it in My tickets.

errors.generic: Could not complete request. Try again.
errors.notHolder: Only the ticket holder can transfer this ticket.
errors.notTransferable: This ticket can no longer be transferred.
errors.cutoffPassed: Transfers close 6 hours before the event starts.
errors.pendingExists: This ticket already has a pending transfer.
errors.notPending: This transfer is no longer pending.
errors.phoneMismatch: Sign in with the phone number the ticket was sent to.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Try again shortly.
